title: rubus × implexus
intro: Rubus × implexus, also known as the hybrid black raspberry or black raspberry, is a hybrid plant between the European raspberry (Rubus idaeus) and the black raspberry (Rubus occidentalis). The plant is valued for its medicinal properties, particularly its anthocyanins and ellagic acid, which are known for their antioxidant, anti-inflammatory, and anti-cancer properties. The health benefits of Rubus × implexus include reducing inflammation, improving cardiovascular health, and potentially preventing certain types of cancer. Rubus × implexus can be prepared as a tea, tincture, or supplement, and is also used in jams, jellies, and other food products due to its flavorful and nutritious fruit.
